Job Title: Junior Software Engineer / Mobile Application Developer

Job Description:

A driven Computer Science undergraduate with strong experience in mobile application development using Flutter and solid foundations in Object-Oriented Programming and Data Structures. Skilled in designing intuitive, secure, and efficient software solutions, with hands-on experience developing real-world projects in Java, C++, and Dart.

Proficient in building cross-platform applications, implementing secure systems, and managing code using Git and GitHub. Experienced in developing systems such as digital wallets, expense trackers, and league management platforms. Passionate about problem-solving, continuous learning, and contributing to collaborative development environments.

Actively participates in technical communities and extracurricular activities, including game development and scouting leadership, demonstrating strong teamwork, communication, and leadership skills.

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain mobile applications using Flutter and Dart

Design and implement OOP-based systems in Java and C++

Build secure and efficient software solutions

Collaborate with team members using Git/GitHub

Analyze requirements and translate them into functional software

Test, debug, and optimize applications for performance

Continuously learn new technologies and best practices

Key Skills:

Flutter & Dart

Java, C++, C# (Basics)

Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)

Data Structures & Algorithms

Git & GitHub

SQL (Basics)

Problem Solving & Analytical Thinking

Communication & Team Leadership
